title: QOLGenerators
description: A simple way to generate resources
body:
**A simple and effective way to generate resources while preventing server and clientside lag!**





![generator](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f9ab3cdb6ab2b04cff75123698c376a60fd46292.png)



**Feel free to use in a modpack!**


Qol Generators is a straightforward and easy way to generate resources!

Currently there are 4 types of generators~

Stone Generator - This generator will generate any stone block using the "base_stone_overworld" tags. (blocks like andesite and tuff will have a chance to generate thanks to this tag)

Log Generator- This will generate any logs (including stripped varients), using the "minecraft;logs" tag

Nether Generator- Generates nether blocks such as netherack. Blackstone, Basalt, as well as Soul Sand and Soil

Ore Generator- This will generate any type of ore using the "forge;ores" tag


Due to the use of tags, this mod is highly compatible with many other mods, offering a way to generate some modded blocks aswell

This mod was created to help prevent server and client lag using cobble/basalt generators, aswell as offer a renewable way to generate blocks.
